task_completion.description: Verify that the agent searched for 'Circadian Rhythm' on the PubMed database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Web browser displaying pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov with 'Circadian Rhythm' in the search bar or search results page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent filtered the search results for 'Free full text' or 'PubMed Central' articles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PubMed search results page showing the 'Free full text' or 'PubMed Central' filter checked or applied in the sidebar/active filters.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent downloaded the PDF full text for the articles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser download manager, PDF viewer, or file manager showing the downloading or completion of PDF files from PubMed/PMC.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'JournalClub' folder in the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing a directory named 'JournalClub' located inside the '~/Documents/' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that three distinct PDFs are saved in the target folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager showing exactly or at least three distinct PDF files inside the 'JournalClub' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the PDFs are renamed according to the FirstAuthor_Year.pdf format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PDF files in the JournalClub folder have names matching the pattern of an author's last name followed by an underscore and a 4-digit year (e.g., Smith_2023.pdf).

integrity.description: Check that the agent actually navigated the PubMed website to find the articles.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser UI showing actual PubMed/PMC pages and navigation, rather than just using terminal commands (like curl/wget) to bypass the search process.

integrity.description: Check that the files are actual downloaded PDFs, not empty dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: File sizes in the file manager are typical for scientific PDFs (e.g., hundreds of KBs or MBs), or a PDF viewer shows actual article content, rather than 0-byte files created via the 'touch' command.

integrity.description: Check that the agent didn't literally name the files 'FirstAuthor_Year.pdf'.
integrity.visual_evidence: Filenames use actual author names and publication years (like 'Takahashi_2015.pdf'), not the literal string 'FirstAuthor_Year.pdf'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory: /home/ga/Documents/JournalClub. Search term: 'Circadian Rhythm'. Required files: 3 distinct PDFs. Filename format: FirstAuthor_Year.pdf (regex: ^[A-Za-z]+_\d{4}\.pdf$). Required domain: pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov (PubMed Central domain may appear as pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov or ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc).
